title: ALTER TABLE fails if a trigger references a non-existant table.
poc:
ALTER TABLE statement in the following script returns an error:
CREATE TABLE t1(a);

CREATE TRIGGER r1 AFTER INSERT ON t2 BEGIN
  INSERT INTO t1(a) VALUES(99);
ALTER TABLE t2 RENAME TO t3;
key_bug_features: Trigger references a non-existent table after DROP TABLE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_sqlite_r1 AFTER INSERT ON fuzz_sqlite_t2 BEGIN INSERT INTO fuzz_sqlite_t1(a) VALUES(99); END;
ALTER TABLE fuzz_sqlite_t2 RENAME TO fuzz_sqlite_t3;
